title: Fresh avocado
description: Fresh avocados, whole fruit, not frozen, for direct consumption.
legal_basis: AHTN Chapter 08 - Edible fruit and nuts

title: Roasted coffee beans, not decaffeinated
description: Roasted Arabica or Robusta coffee beans, not decaffeinated, packed in retail bags.
legal_basis: AHTN Chapter 09 - Coffee, tea, mate and spices

title: Semi-milled or wholly milled rice
description: Processed white rice grains, semi-milled or wholly milled, for food distribution.
